infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: REDFLAGS needs access to your camera to capture and analyze dating signals in real-time.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: REDFLAGS needs access to your photos to import and analyze screenshots from your dating apps.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: REDFLAGS uses your location to provide context-aware insights based on your dating environment.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: REDFLAGS needs access to your microphone to analyze vocal cues and emotional tone during dates.

plugins.microphonePermission: REDFLAGS needs access to your microphone to analyze vocal cues and emotional tone during dates.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow REDFLAGS to transcribe your observations in real-time.
